# CapabilityNegotiation.NotificationRequiredCapability method

Returns the capability/sub-flag that gates *notification*, or `null` for an ungated one. Mirrors TS `notificationRequiredCapability`.

```csharp
public static string? NotificationRequiredCapability(string notification)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| notification | The notification name. |

## Return Value

The gating capability/sub-flag, or `null`.
